# Extração: 05-Facebook Ad Creation Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-Facebook Ad Creation Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 4.69 MB

---

Use this checklist every time you create and launch a new ad on Meta.
NOTE: Steps and options will vary depending on the various campaign and ad types.
From inside the Meta Ads Manager click the Create button
If creating a new Campaign (default) choose the Campaign Objective
(Reach, Conversion, etc)
Give Campaign a name, select campaign options (may all be left on default),
and click Next
Optional: Assign special category only if in finance, real estate, politics, etc
Optional: Add a campaign spending limit in options (not needed here)
Optional: A/B split testing, which can be created AFTER you complete setup
Optional: Campaign Budget Optimization to control spending at campaign level
CAMPAIGN LEVEL SETUP
Give Ad Set a name (include targeting details)
Select Conversion Event location (will usually be Website)
If Website: select pixel (can be same pixel for all)
Dynamic Creative (turn on or leave off) to test multiple ad variations
Offer (you will usually leave this off)
Set Budget (only if using Ad Set Budget Optimization)
Optional: Set end date for ad spent
Set Start Date for the ad (usually start immediately)
Optional: Set end date for the ad to run (usually left empty)
Create New Audience OR Use Saved Audience (will usually be new)
Custom Audience: Only use for custom or Lookalike audiences
Exclude: Only use if you want to exclude previous buyers, viewers, etc
Demographics: Location, Age, Gender, Language, etc
Detailed Targeting: Add specific interests (type for recommendations)
Optional: Detailed Targeting Expansion (usually leave on)
Languages: Recommended to change to ideal language
Optional: Save audience to use again later
Configure Placements to determine where the ad will run (default is everywhere)
May only Facebook and Instagram (and exclude Audience Network)
If you want to only display on mobile or desktop click more options
Optimization and Delivery is usually left to default (edit when more advanced)
AD SET LEVEL SETUP
META AD CREATION CHECKLISTwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Give your ad a name (something easily recognizable)
Choose Facebook page and Instagram account (Instagram optional)
For Ad Setup, either Create New Ad or Use Existing Post
(re-run ad already created)
When creating a new ad, will usually be a video or single image
(use Carousels for multiple)
Add image and crop if needed (size will varies based on platform)
OR add video and upload to the account
Add all needed ad text:
Primary text (main ad copy, remember to start strong)
Headline (most important, make it attention-grabbing)
Description (not always seen, should invoke action to click)
Add Call to Action button (choose the best option for the particular ad)
Add the landing page destination link AND simple display link
(examplewebsite.com)
Confirm correct tracking pixel and tracking details
Advanced: Add URL parameters and tags (not needed)
Review ad one more time and click Publish
Wait for the ad to be approved by Meta compliance
AD LEVEL SETUP

When Complete… Your Ad Is Live!
Use this checklist every time you create and launch a new ad on Meta.
NOTE: Steps and options will vary depending on the various campaign and ad types.
